// SlowQueryThresholdMs: Set to 0 temporarily to prove the interceptor logs EVERY query (Part 7). Restore to 100 afterwards.

ConnectionStrings.// DefaultConnection: Part 9 DEVELOPMENT pool. One developer, one instance, a laptop Postgres -> a large warm pool wastes connections. Minimum Pool Size=1, Maximum Pool Size=10. Port 5544 matches docker-compose.

// Jwt: LOCAL DEV signing key only — throwaway, never used outside development. A real deployment overrides Jwt:Key via secrets. Inherits Issuer/Audience from appsettings.json.
